# Decision Log — [Project Name]

Use this log to capture every significant decision made during the project. Record the context, options considered, and rationale so future contributors can understand *why* choices were made.

> **Tip:** Log a decision as soon as it is made. Even a one-line note is better than nothing.

---

## Decision Log

| ID | Date | Decision | Context / Problem | Options Considered | Decision Rationale | Owner | Status |
|----|------|----------|-------------------|--------------------|--------------------|-------|--------|
| D-001 | YYYY-MM-DD | <!-- Short decision title --> | <!-- Why was a decision needed? --> | <!-- Option A; Option B; Option C --> | <!-- Why was this option chosen? --> | @username | Accepted |
| D-002 | | | | | | | |

---

## Field Definitions

| Field | Description |
|---|---|
| **ID** | Sequential identifier (D-001, D-002, …) |
| **Date** | Date the decision was made (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| **Decision** | One-sentence summary of what was decided |
| **Context / Problem** | The question or trade-off that prompted the decision |
| **Options Considered** | All alternatives that were evaluated |
| **Decision Rationale** | Reasons the chosen option was selected over the others |
| **Owner** | Person accountable for this decision (GitHub @username or name) |
| **Status** | `Proposed` → `Accepted` → `Superseded` → `Deprecated` |

---

## Status Definitions

- **Proposed** — Under discussion; not yet agreed.
- **Accepted** — Agreed and in effect.
- **Superseded** — Replaced by a newer decision (link to the new ID).
- **Deprecated** — No longer relevant (e.g., the feature was removed).

---
